title: Error: unmounting container <...> storage: cleaning up container <...> root filesystem: removing mount point <...>/merged: directory not empty
body:
### Issue Description

I get the following error on podman 4.9.3 when destroying containers that use CUDA:

```
Error: unmounting container e195230328a0731ab7769fbf45ea0cd8f3ccd54777389f09a5b76202507ff0b5 storage: cleaning up container e195230328a0731ab7769fbf45ea0cd8f3ccd54777389f09a5b76202507ff0b5 storage: unmounting container e195230328a0731ab7769fbf45ea0cd8f3ccd54777389f09a5b76202507ff0b5 root filesystem: removing mount point "/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/10fc368c6a5dbe55fa1ef50bebda1404ddd4126b1d07c795dc4e2d21ca0c9edc/merged": directory not empty
Error: cannot remove container e195230328a0731ab7769fbf45ea0cd8f3ccd54777389f09a5b76202507ff0b5 as it is stopping - running or paused containers cannot be removed without force: container state improper
Error: not all containers could be removed from pod 4433f7927b12f6d207a55bc6a2e9dafb3d0cd552c0e29ab1dbe4086d2dcd15af: removing pod containers
Error: error removing container e195230328a0731ab7769fbf45ea0cd8f3ccd54777389f09a5b76202507ff0b5 from pod 4433f7927b12f6d207a55bc6a2e9dafb3d0cd552c0e29ab1dbe4086d2dcd15af: cannot remove container e195230328a0731ab7769fbf45ea0cd8f3ccd54777389f09a5b76202507ff0b5 as it is stopping - running or paused containers cannot be removed without force: container state improper
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Start container that uses CUDA, e.g. docker.io/lmsysorg/sglang:v0.4.6.post2-cu124 or vllm.
Stop it. Observe error

### Describe the results you received

Error output.

### Describe the results you expected

No error.

### podman info output

```yaml
4.9.3
```

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Privileged

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

This has already been fixed in 5.5.1.

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body: Fixed as of 5.5.1. I opened this issue because I didn't find it already opened, maybe it will save some time for someone as it's clear that only upgrade is needed.
